scripts.build:css: tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./internal/static/css/tailwind-login.input.css -o ./internal/static/css/tailwind-login.css --minify && tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./internal/static/css/tailwind-dashboard.input.css -o ./internal/static/css/tailwind-dashboard.css --minify && tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./internal/static/css/tailwind-download.input.css -o ./internal/static/css/tailwind-download.css --minify && tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./internal/static/css/tailwind-config.input.css -o ./internal/static/css/tailwind-config.css --minify
